title: Elderberry
summary: A dark berry preparation traditionally used in seasonal folk practice.
traditional_use: Elderberry has a long folk history as a seasonal remedy. Traditionally it is prepared as a syrup or decoction when people want a warming, dark berry infusion during the cold months.

method_steps.title: Cook
method_steps.text: Simmer the berries thoroughly rather than using them raw.

method_steps.title: Strain
method_steps.text: Press through a sieve to remove skins and seeds.

method_steps.title: Store
method_steps.text: Keep refrigerated and use only a small serving at a time.

dosage_note: Traditional range only; keep servings small and preparation thorough.

components.prep_notes: Simmer thoroughly rather than using raw material.
